title: tenants.yaml — bloco rag (epic 012 extension)
description: Validacao do bloco rag dentro de cada tenant em config/tenants.yaml. Hot-reloaded em <=60s pelo config_poller (epic 010). YAML invalido rejeitado com fail-safe — config anterior permanece (FR-046).

enabled.description: Master flag. False = upload returns 403, tool not exposed to LLM. Default false (opt-in).

top_k.description: Default number of chunks returned by search_knowledge tool. LLM may pass smaller value via top_k arg. Server-side hard cap is 20 (FR-034).

max_upload_mb.description: Max raw file size for upload (FR-013). Files larger return 413 max_upload_mb_exceeded.

max_documents_per_tenant.description: Soft quota. Replace by source_name does not count toward this (delta=0). Override per-tenant for enterprise. (FR-073)

max_chunks_per_tenant.description: Soft quota. Hard cap absolute is 50000 enforced server-side regardless of override (R9 — protects HNSW perf). Replace by source_name deduces old chunks from total.

min_distance_threshold.description: OPTIONAL. If set, chunks with cosine distance > threshold are dropped from result. Adiado para 012.1 — null em v1 (LLM filtra no contexto).

fail_safe_behavior.description: Quando o YAML e invalido por este schema, config_poller (epic 010) loga 'tenant_config_reload_failed{tenant, reason}' + emite metric do mesmo nome; configuracao anterior permanece ativa (FR-046).

integration_with_tenants_yaml.description: O bloco rag e adicionado dentro de cada tenant entry em tenants.yaml. Exemplo de integracao:
